heading: Loan contracts for deferment of repayment installments; amendment or supplementation
label: 422k–1 Loan contracts for deferment of repayment installments; amendment or supplementation
text: A loan contract negotiated and executed pursuant to this subchapter may be amended or supplemented for the purpose of deferring repayment installments in accordance with the provisions of .section 485b–1(b) of this title
